flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St. Joseph's University-New York rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.1k → $16.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St. Joseph's University-New York rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.6k → $36.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at St. Joseph's University-New York fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 3.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at St. Joseph's University-New York rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.5k → $22.0k).
